title: Supporting nonprofit and community innovation
titleZh: 支持非营利组织和社区创新
summary: OpenAI launches a $50M People-First AI Fund to help U.S. nonprofits scale impact with AI. Applications open Sept 8–Oct 8, 2025 for grants in education, healthcare, research, and more.
summaryZh: OpenAI推出了5000万美元的以人为本的人工智能基金，以帮助美国非营利组织利用人工智能扩大影响力。2025年9月8日至10月8日开放申请，申请教育、医疗保健、研究等领域的补助金。

Applications open Sept 8–Oct 8, 2025 for grants in education, healthcare, research, and more.

title: Collective alignment: public input on our Model Spec
titleZh: 集体调整：公众对我们车型规格的意见
summary: OpenAI surveyed over 1,000 people worldwide on how AI should behave and compared their views to our Model Spec. Learn how collective alignment is shaping AI defaults to better reflect diverse human values and perspectives.
summaryZh: OpenAI对全球1000多人进行了有关人工智能应该如何表现的调查，并将他们的观点与我们的模型规格进行了比较。了解集体一致性如何塑造人工智能默认值，以更好地反映不同的人类价值观和观点。
highlights: OpenAI surveyed over 1,000 people worldwide on how AI should behave and compared their views to our Model Spec.
Learn how collective alignment is shaping AI defaults to better reflect diverse human values and perspectives.
highlightsZh: OpenAI对全球1000多人进行了有关人工智能应该如何表现的调查，并将他们的观点与我们的模型规格进行了比较。了解集体一致性如何塑造人工智能默认值，以更好地反映不同的人类价值观和观点。

title: OpenAI and Anthropic share findings from a joint safety evaluation
titleZh: OpenAI和Anthropic分享联合安全评估的结果
summary: OpenAI and Anthropic share findings from a first-of-its-kind joint safety evaluation, testing each other’s models for misalignment, instruction following, hallucinations, jailbreaking, and more—highlighting progress, challenges, and the value of cross-lab collaboration.
summaryZh: OpenAI和Anthropic分享了首次联合安全评估的结果，测试了彼此的模型是否存在错位、指令跟踪、幻觉、越狱等问题，并强调了跨实验室协作的进展、挑战和价值。
highlights: OpenAI and Anthropic share findings from a first-of-its-kind joint safety evaluation, testing each other’s models for misalignment, instruction following, hallucinations, jailbreak

title: OpenAI’s letter to Governor Newsom on harmonized regulation
titleZh: OpenAI致州长纽森关于统一监管的信函
summary: We’ve just sent a letter to Gov. Gavin Newsom calling for California to lead the way in harmonizing state-based AI regulation with national—and, by virtue of US leadership, emerging global—standards.
summaryZh: 我们刚刚给加州州长加文·纽瑟姆（ Gavin Newsom ）写了一封信，呼吁加州率先将基于州的人工智能监管与国家标准相协调，并借助美国的领导力，将新兴的全球标准相协调。

Gavin Newsom calling for California to lead the way in harmonizing state-based AI regulation with national—and, by virtue of US leadership, emerging global—standards.

title: Providing ChatGPT to the Entire U.S. Federal Workforce

title: Open Weights and AI for All
titleZh: 开放式权重和面向所有人的人工智能
summary: AI’s next frontier isn’t just about capability—it’s about who gets to use it. Our mission to put AI in the hands of as many people as possible is what drives us. Today’s release of our most capable open-weights models is a major step forward that makes advanced AI more open, flexible, and accessible worldwide.
summaryZh: 人工智能的下一个前沿领域不仅仅是能力，而是谁可以使用它。我们的使命是让尽可能多的人掌握人工智能，这是我们的动力。今天，我们发布了功能最强大的开放式重量级模型，这是向前迈出的重要一步，使先进的人工智能在全球范围内更加开放、灵活和可访问。
highlights: AI’s next frontier isn’t just about capability—it’s about who gets to use it.
Our mission to put AI in the hands of as many people as possible is what drives us.
highlightsZh: 人工智能的下一个前沿领域不仅仅是能力，而是谁可以使用它。我们的使命是让尽可能多的人掌握人工智能，这是我们的动力。今天，我们发布了功能最强大的开放式重量级模型，这是向前迈出的重要一步，使先进的人工智能在全球范围内更加开放、灵活和可访问。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: Estimating worst case frontier risks of open weight LLMs
titleZh: 估计开放式权重LLM的最坏情况前沿风险
summary: In this paper, we study the worst-case frontier risks of releasing gpt-oss. We introduce malicious fine-tuning (MFT), where we attempt to elicit maximum capabilities by fine-tuning gpt-oss to be as capable as possible in two domains: biology and cybersecurity.
summaryZh: 在本文中，我们研究了释放gpt-oss的最坏情况前沿风险。我们引入了恶意微调（ MFT ） ，我们试图通过微调gpt-oss来在生物学和网络安全这两个领域尽可能地发挥最大能力。
highlights: In this paper, we study the worst-case frontier risks of releasing gpt-oss.

title: What we’re optimizing ChatGPT for
summary: We build ChatGPT to help you thrive in all the ways you want. Learn how we're improving support for tough moments, have rolled out reminders to take breaks, and are working on better life advice, all guided by expert input.
summaryZh: 我们构建ChatGPT ，帮助您以您想要的方式蓬勃发展。了解我们如何改善对艰难时刻的支持，如何推出休息提醒，以及如何在专家意见的指导下制定更好的生活建议。

title: Figma uses AI to transform digital design
titleZh: Figma使用人工智能来转变数字设计
summary: Discover how Figma is transforming digital design with AI. David Kossnick shares how tools like Figma Make empower teams to prototype, collaborate, and build with AI—reshaping workflows for designers, developers, and non-technical creators alike.
summaryZh: 了解Figma如何利用人工智能改变数字设计。David Kossnick分享了Figma Make等工具如何为设计师、开发人员和非技术创作者提供原型、协作和构建人工智能新工作流程的能力。
